footer-text: © %YEAR% Adam Lawrence | Last updated on
about-p1: I am a PhD student in Civil and Environmental Engineering at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, working with Professor Jinhui Yan on computational mechanics, free-surface hydrodynamics, and photopolymerization modelling.
about-p2: My research entails computational mechanics and modelling, mainly in free-surface hydrodynamics, with additional applications in photopolymerization and additive manufacturing.
about-p3: I am from Melbourne, Australia, where I completed undergraduate and master's study in environmental engineering, specializing in hydraulic engineering with a minor in computer science. I am also an AUKUS fellow through the Australian-American Association.
about-p4: I have a keen interest in literature, history, geography, and the environment. I use visual storytelling to make complex scientific concepts easier to understand, with examples on my writings page and YouTube.
about-p5: This site collects my research software, writings, publications, and personal technical interests in one place.
about-p6: For enquiries, collaboration, or summer internship opportunities, reach me at adamrl3@illinois.edu.
